context: Tests whether the agent uses item-item collaborative filtering with the correct time window, Jaccard similarity normalization, appropriate limits on stored items, daily cache refresh, and a nightly batch rebuild pattern as specified by the personalization skill.

checklist.name: Item-item collaborative filtering
checklist.description: The implementation builds product-to-product similarity by finding co-occurring products in the same session (item-item approach), not user-item matrix factorization

checklist.name: 90-day event window
checklist.description: The query for building the co-occurrence matrix filters events to those within the last 90 days (not 30, 60, 180, or all-time)

checklist.name: Session co-occurrence basis
checklist.description: Co-occurrence is grouped by session (not by user) and requires at least 2 distinct products per session

checklist.name: Jaccard similarity formula
checklist.description: Similarity is computed as coCount / (countA + countB - coCount) — the Jaccard formula — not cosine, Pearson, or a raw count

checklist.name: Top 50 similar items stored
checklist.description: For each product, only the top 50 most similar products are stored (not top 10, 20, 100, or all)

checklist.name: 24-hour Redis cache expiry
checklist.description: Similarity data in Redis is set with an expiry of 24 hours (86400 seconds), refreshed daily

checklist.name: Nightly batch rebuild
checklist.description: The nightly-rebuild.ts job file shows the co-occurrence build triggered on a scheduled/nightly basis (not on every request or in real-time)

checklist.name: Design notes: similarity metric
checklist.description: design-notes.md identifies the similarity metric used (Jaccard) and explains the choice

checklist.name: Design notes: history window
checklist.description: design-notes.md states that purchase history from the last 90 days is used

checklist.name: Design notes: cache TTL
checklist.description: design-notes.md mentions that similarity results are cached for 24 hours before being refreshed

checklist.name: Purchase and cart events used
checklist.description: The co-occurrence query uses both 'purchase' and 'add_to_cart' event types (not views alone, not purchases alone)
